title: Morgan Stanley Raises AMD Stock Price Target After Earnings Beat
text: Morgan Stanley raised its AMD stock price target to $410 from $360 while maintaining an equal-weight rating. The analysts lifted their valuation multiple from roughly 32 times to 37 times CY27 non-GAAP EPS estimates, citing multiple expansion across the peer group including Intel and a stronger multiyear CPU outlook. The raise reflects Morgan Stanley's confidence in AMD's data center and server CPU growth trajectory driven by AI adoption. The firm emphasized that agentic AI and server CPU demand represent key drivers for AMD's growth prospects. This positive outlook from Morgan Stanley adds to the broader analyst community's bullish stance on AMD following the company's exceptional Q1 2026 earnings report, which demonstrated the company's ability to capitalize on AI infrastructure investment.
